name: ru.vhrgames.sdk
description: Mandatory VHR Games SDK for Unity 6 WebGL titles. Provides player profile + name resolution, friends, player stats/progression, achievements, game sessions, economy (incl. ad reports), leaderboard, tournaments, lobby/matchmaking + relay multiplayer, server matchmaking (UDP, domain/uuid) and session services that talk to the VHR backend, plus a build marker handshake (vhr-sdk.json) that the backend validates on upload. Builds without this SDK are rejected on confirm-upload.

samples.description: Minimal MonoBehaviour showing init, balance fetch and coin grant.

_vhr_install_note: R3 and VContainer are NOT bundled. Add the OpenUPM scoped registry (https://package.openupm.com) with scopes com.cysharp.r3 and jp.hadashikick.vcontainer, then install 'R3' (com.cysharp.r3) and 'VContainer' (jp.hadashikick.vcontainer) via Package Manager. R3 additionally requires the NuGet 'System.Reactive' / 'R3' core DLLs via NuGetForUnity or the unitypackage from the R3 repo. See README.md > Installation.
